mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand and construction sector activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative Sharpe ratio over 60-day horizons or decouples from equity performance during demand-driven recessions.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during supply-constrained regimes or Rank IC remains negative across 5-day forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product confirms expanding economic output and corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >50% of quarters with positive GDP growth or the correlation coefficient drops below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month CPI increase above 0.4 percent triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening and margin compression, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite high inflation prints or the threshold fails to predict return direction with >55% accuracy.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining federal funds rate creates a favorable liquidity and employment environment, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal underperforms a buy-and-hold benchmark or yields negative alpha during stagflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and inventory drawdowns, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of triggered instances or the signal loses predictive power during inventory restocking phases.
